tagline: Internal medicine, practiced with discipline. Whole-patient care, board-certified.
services_intro: Adult internal medicine. Preventive, diagnostic, and ongoing chronic-condition management — practiced with rigor.
service_1_desc: Comprehensive yearly exams. Labs, vitals, screenings, and a real conversation.
service_2_desc: Diabetes, hypertension, cholesterol — coordinated long-term care plans.
service_3_desc: Second opinions, complex cases, and referrals managed personally.
review_1_quote: Dr. Tejani actually listens. He spent 45 minutes with me on the first visit — I'd never had that before.
review_2_quote: Clear explanations. He told me what was happening in my body in plain English.
review_3_quote: Best primary care doctor I've ever had. Worth driving across the city for.
about_paragraph: Dr. Nizar Tejani is a board-certified internal medicine physician committed to old-school whole-patient care backed by modern diagnostics. Long appointments, clear plans, and direct access when you need him.
